# Stage 2B Menu Integration Snippets

Add these snippets to admin navigation templates so Stage 2B tools are visible in the hub.

## Target Templates

1. `application/admin/hub/aui/templates/hub_home.html` (main admin hub)

1. Any other admin menu templates where mockup tools are listed

## Snippet 1: New Stage 2B Cards

Add after the existing Mockups tools (for example, after Category Manager):

```html
<a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('mockup_generator.mockup_generator_dashboard') }}">
  <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Mockup Generator Dashboard</div>
  <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Monitor real-time generation pipeline status. View job counts by status (Pending, Generating, Processing, Completed, Failed) and trigger batch generation runs.</div>
</a>

<a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('utility.solid_image_generator_form') }}">
  <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Solid Image Generator</div>
  <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Generate high-resolution solid color placeholder images. Select from 13 aspect ratios and customize color for testing and reference. Default matte cyan (#00FFFF).</div>
</a>
```

<a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('mockup_generator.mockup_generator_dashboard') }}">

  <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Monitor real-time generation pipeline status. View job counts by status (Pending, Generating, Processing, Completed, Failed) and trigger batch generation runs.</div>

</a>

```html
<h2>Mockups</h2>
<div class="artlomo-workstation-grid" role="navigation" aria-label="Mockup tools">
  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('mockups_admin.upload_bases') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Upload Mockup Bases</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Add new mockup template base images to the system library.</div>
  </a>
  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('mockups_admin.bases') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Mockup Bases</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Browse and manage existing mockup bases.</div>
  </a>
  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('mockups_admin.category_manager') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Category Manager</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Organise mockup categories and assignment rules.</div>
  </a>
  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('mockup_generator.mockup_generator_dashboard') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Mockup Generator Dashboard</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Monitor real-time generation pipeline status. View job counts by status (Pending, Generating, Processing, Completed, Failed) and trigger batch generation runs.</div>
  </a>
  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('utility.solid_image_generator_form') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Solid Image Generator</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Generate high-resolution solid color placeholder images. Select from 13 aspect ratios and customize color for testing and reference. Default matte cyan (#00FFFF).</div>
  </a>
</div>
```

<h2>Mockups</h2>
<div class="artlomo-workstation-grid" role="navigation" aria-label="Mockup tools">
  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('mockups_admin.upload_bases') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Upload Mockup Bases</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Add new mockup template base images to the system library.</div>
  </a>
  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('mockups_admin.bases') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Mockup Bases</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Browse and manage existing mockup bases.</div>
  </a>
  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('mockups_admin.category_manager') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Category Manager</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Organise mockup categories and assignment rules.</div>
  </a>
  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('mockup_generator.mockup_generator_dashboard') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Mockup Generator Dashboard</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Monitor real-time generation pipeline status. View job counts by status (Pending, Generating, Processing, Completed, Failed) and trigger batch generation runs.</div>
  </a>
  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('utility.solid_image_generator_form') }}">

  </a>
</div>

    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Add new mockup template base images to the system library.</div>
  </a>
  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('mockups_admin.bases') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Mockup Bases</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Browse and manage existing mockup bases.</div>
  </a>
  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('mockups_admin.category_manager') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Category Manager</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Organise mockup categories and assignment rules.</div>
  </a>
  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('mockup_generator.mockup_generator_dashboard') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Mockup Generator Dashboard</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Monitor real-time generation pipeline status. View job counts by status (Pending, Generating, Processing, Completed, Failed) and trigger batch generation runs.</div>
  </a>
  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('utility.solid_image_generator_form') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Solid Image Generator</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Generate high-resolution solid color placeholder images. Select from 13 aspect ratios and customize color for testing and reference. Default matte cyan (#00FFFF).</div>
  </a>
</div>

  </a>
</div>

    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Add new mockup template base images to the system library.</div>
  </a>
  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('mockups_admin.bases') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Mockup Bases</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Browse and manage existing mockup bases.</div>

  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('mockups_admin.category_manager') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Category Manager</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Organise mockup categories and assignment rules.</div>

  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('mockup_generator.mockup_generator_dashboard') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Mockup Generator Dashboard</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Monitor real-time generation pipeline status. View job counts by status (Pending, Generating, Processing, Completed, Failed) and trigger batch generation runs.</div>
  </a>
  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('utility.solid_image_generator_form') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Solid Image Generator</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Generate high-resolution solid color placeholder images. Select from 13 aspect ratios and customize color for testing and reference. Default matte cyan (#00FFFF).</div>
  </a>
</div>

  </a>
</div>

    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Add new mockup template base images to the system library.</div>
  </a>
  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('mockups_admin.bases') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Mockup Bases</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Browse and manage existing mockup bases.</div>
  </a>
  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('mockups_admin.category_manager') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Category Manager</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Organise mockup categories and assignment rules.</div>
  </a>
  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('mockup_generator.mockup_generator_dashboard') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Mockup Generator Dashboard</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Monitor real-time generation pipeline status. View job counts by status (Pending, Generating, Processing, Completed, Failed) and trigger batch generation runs.</div>
  </a>
  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('utility.solid_image_generator_form') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Solid Image Generator</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Generate high-resolution solid color placeholder images. Select from 13 aspect ratios and customize color for testing and reference. Default matte cyan (#00FFFF).</div>
  </a>
</div>

</div>

    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Add new mockup template base images to the system library.</div>
  </a>
  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('mockups_admin.bases') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Mockup Bases</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Browse and manage existing mockup bases.</div>

  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('mockups_admin.category_manager') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Category Manager</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Organise mockup categories and assignment rules.</div>

  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('mockup_generator.mockup_generator_dashboard') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Mockup Generator Dashboard</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Monitor real-time generation pipeline status. View job counts by status (Pending, Generating, Processing, Completed, Failed) and trigger batch generation runs.</div>
  </a>
  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('utility.solid_image_generator_form') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Solid Image Generator</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Generate high-resolution solid color placeholder images. Select from 13 aspect ratios and customize color for testing and reference. Default matte cyan (#00FFFF).</div>
  </a>
</div>

    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Solid Image Generator</div>

  </a>
</div>

    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Add new mockup template base images to the system library.</div>
  </a>
  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('mockups_admin.bases') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Mockup Bases</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Browse and manage existing mockup bases.</div>

  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('mockups_admin.category_manager') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Category Manager</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Organise mockup categories and assignment rules.</div>

  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('mockup_generator.mockup_generator_dashboard') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Mockup Generator Dashboard</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Monitor real-time generation pipeline status. View job counts by status (Pending, Generating, Processing, Completed, Failed) and trigger batch generation runs.</div>
  </a>
  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('utility.solid_image_generator_form') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Solid Image Generator</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Generate high-resolution solid color placeholder images. Select from 13 aspect ratios and customize color for testing and reference. Default matte cyan (#00FFFF).</div>
  </a>
</div>

  </a>
</div>

    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Add new mockup template base images to the system library.</div>
  </a>
  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('mockups_admin.bases') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Mockup Bases</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Browse and manage existing mockup bases.</div>

  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('mockups_admin.category_manager') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Category Manager</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Organise mockup categories and assignment rules.</div>

  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('mockup_generator.mockup_generator_dashboard') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Mockup Generator Dashboard</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Monitor real-time generation pipeline status. View job counts by status (Pending, Generating, Processing, Completed, Failed) and trigger batch generation runs.</div>
  </a>
  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('utility.solid_image_generator_form') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Solid Image Generator</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Generate high-resolution solid color placeholder images. Select from 13 aspect ratios and customize color for testing and reference. Default matte cyan (#00FFFF).</div>
  </a>
</div>

  </a>
</div>

    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Add new mockup template base images to the system library.</div>
  </a>
  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('mockups_admin.bases') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Mockup Bases</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Browse and manage existing mockup bases.</div>

  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('mockups_admin.category_manager') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Category Manager</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Organise mockup categories and assignment rules.</div>

  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('mockup_generator.mockup_generator_dashboard') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Mockup Generator Dashboard</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Monitor real-time generation pipeline status. View job counts by status (Pending, Generating, Processing, Completed, Failed) and trigger batch generation runs.</div>
  </a>
  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('utility.solid_image_generator_form') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Solid Image Generator</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Generate high-resolution solid color placeholder images. Select from 13 aspect ratios and customize color for testing and reference. Default matte cyan (#00FFFF).</div>
  </a>
</div>

  </a>
</div>

    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Add new mockup template base images to the system library.</div>
  </a>
  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('mockups_admin.bases') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Mockup Bases</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Browse and manage existing mockup bases.</div>

  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('mockups_admin.category_manager') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Category Manager</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Organise mockup categories and assignment rules.</div>

  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('mockup_generator.mockup_generator_dashboard') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Mockup Generator Dashboard</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Monitor real-time generation pipeline status. View job counts by status (Pending, Generating, Processing, Completed, Failed) and trigger batch generation runs.</div>
  </a>
  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('utility.solid_image_generator_form') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Solid Image Generator</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Generate high-resolution solid color placeholder images. Select from 13 aspect ratios and customize color for testing and reference. Default matte cyan (#00FFFF).</div>
  </a>
</div>

  </a>
</div>

    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Add new mockup template base images to the system library.</div>
  </a>
  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('mockups_admin.bases') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Mockup Bases</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Browse and manage existing mockup bases.</div>

  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('mockups_admin.category_manager') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Category Manager</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Organise mockup categories and assignment rules.</div>

  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('mockup_generator.mockup_generator_dashboard') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Mockup Generator Dashboard</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Monitor real-time generation pipeline status. View job counts by status (Pending, Generating, Processing, Completed, Failed) and trigger batch generation runs.</div>
  </a>
  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('utility.solid_image_generator_form') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Solid Image Generator</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Generate high-resolution solid color placeholder images. Select from 13 aspect ratios and customize color for testing and reference. Default matte cyan (#00FFFF).</div>
  </a>
</div>

    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Solid Image Generator</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Generate high-resolution solid color placeholder images. Select from 13 aspect ratios and customize color for testing and reference. Default matte cyan (#00FFFF).</div>
  </a>
</div>

    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Add new mockup template base images to the system library.</div>
  </a>
  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('mockups_admin.bases') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Mockup Bases</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Browse and manage existing mockup bases.</div>
  </a>
  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('mockups_admin.category_manager') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Category Manager</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Organise mockup categories and assignment rules.</div>
  </a>
  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('mockup_generator.mockup_generator_dashboard') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Mockup Generator Dashboard</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Monitor real-time generation pipeline status. View job counts by status (Pending, Generating, Processing, Completed, Failed) and trigger batch generation runs.</div>
  </a>
  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('utility.solid_image_generator_form') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Solid Image Generator</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Generate high-resolution solid color placeholder images. Select from 13 aspect ratios and customize color for testing and reference. Default matte cyan (#00FFFF).</div>
  </a>
</div>

  </a>
</div>

    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Add new mockup template base images to the system library.</div>
  </a>
  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('mockups_admin.bases') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Mockup Bases</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Browse and manage existing mockup bases.</div>

  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('mockups_admin.category_manager') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Category Manager</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Organise mockup categories and assignment rules.</div>

  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('mockup_generator.mockup_generator_dashboard') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Mockup Generator Dashboard</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Monitor real-time generation pipeline status. View job counts by status (Pending, Generating, Processing, Completed, Failed) and trigger batch generation runs.</div>
  </a>
  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('utility.solid_image_generator_form') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Solid Image Generator</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Generate high-resolution solid color placeholder images. Select from 13 aspect ratios and customize color for testing and reference. Default matte cyan (#00FFFF).</div>
  </a>
</div>

    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Solid Image Generator</div>

  </a>
</div>

    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Add new mockup template base images to the system library.</div>
  </a>
  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('mockups_admin.bases') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Mockup Bases</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Browse and manage existing mockup bases.</div>

  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('mockups_admin.category_manager') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Category Manager</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Organise mockup categories and assignment rules.</div>

  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('mockup_generator.mockup_generator_dashboard') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Mockup Generator Dashboard</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Monitor real-time generation pipeline status. View job counts by status (Pending, Generating, Processing, Completed, Failed) and trigger batch generation runs.</div>
  </a>
  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('utility.solid_image_generator_form') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Solid Image Generator</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Generate high-resolution solid color placeholder images. Select from 13 aspect ratios and customize color for testing and reference. Default matte cyan (#00FFFF).</div>
  </a>
</div>

  </a>
</div>

    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Add new mockup template base images to the system library.</div>
  </a>
  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('mockups_admin.bases') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Mockup Bases</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Browse and manage existing mockup bases.</div>

  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('mockups_admin.category_manager') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Category Manager</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Organise mockup categories and assignment rules.</div>

  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('mockup_generator.mockup_generator_dashboard') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Mockup Generator Dashboard</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Monitor real-time generation pipeline status. View job counts by status (Pending, Generating, Processing, Completed, Failed) and trigger batch generation runs.</div>
  </a>
  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('utility.solid_image_generator_form') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Solid Image Generator</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Generate high-resolution solid color placeholder images. Select from 13 aspect ratios and customize color for testing and reference. Default matte cyan (#00FFFF).</div>
  </a>
</div>

  </a>
</div>

    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Add new mockup template base images to the system library.</div>
  </a>
  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('mockups_admin.bases') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Mockup Bases</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Browse and manage existing mockup bases.</div>

  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('mockups_admin.category_manager') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Category Manager</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Organise mockup categories and assignment rules.</div>

  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('mockup_generator.mockup_generator_dashboard') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Mockup Generator Dashboard</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Monitor real-time generation pipeline status. View job counts by status (Pending, Generating, Processing, Completed, Failed) and trigger batch generation runs.</div>
  </a>
  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('utility.solid_image_generator_form') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Solid Image Generator</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Generate high-resolution solid color placeholder images. Select from 13 aspect ratios and customize color for testing and reference. Default matte cyan (#00FFFF).</div>
  </a>
</div>

  </a>
</div>

    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Add new mockup template base images to the system library.</div>
  </a>
  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('mockups_admin.bases') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Mockup Bases</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Browse and manage existing mockup bases.</div>
  </a>
  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('mockups_admin.category_manager') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Category Manager</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Organise mockup categories and assignment rules.</div>
  </a>
  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('mockup_generator.mockup_generator_dashboard') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Mockup Generator Dashboard</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Monitor real-time generation pipeline status. View job counts by status (Pending, Generating, Processing, Completed, Failed) and trigger batch generation runs.</div>
  </a>
  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('utility.solid_image_generator_form') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Solid Image Generator</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Generate high-resolution solid color placeholder images. Select from 13 aspect ratios and customize color for testing and reference. Default matte cyan (#00FFFF).</div>
  </a>
</div>

  </a>
</div>

    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Add new mockup template base images to the system library.</div>
  </a>
  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('mockups_admin.bases') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Mockup Bases</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Browse and manage existing mockup bases.</div>

  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('mockups_admin.category_manager') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Category Manager</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Organise mockup categories and assignment rules.</div>

  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('mockup_generator.mockup_generator_dashboard') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Mockup Generator Dashboard</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Monitor real-time generation pipeline status. View job counts by status (Pending, Generating, Processing, Completed, Failed) and trigger batch generation runs.</div>
  </a>
  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('utility.solid_image_generator_form') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Solid Image Generator</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Generate high-resolution solid color placeholder images. Select from 13 aspect ratios and customize color for testing and reference. Default matte cyan (#00FFFF).</div>
  </a>
</div>

  </a>
</div>

    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Add new mockup template base images to the system library.</div>
  </a>
  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('mockups_admin.bases') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Mockup Bases</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Browse and manage existing mockup bases.</div>
  </a>
  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('mockups_admin.category_manager') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Category Manager</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Organise mockup categories and assignment rules.</div>
  </a>
  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('mockup_generator.mockup_generator_dashboard') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Mockup Generator Dashboard</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Monitor real-time generation pipeline status. View job counts by status (Pending, Generating, Processing, Completed, Failed) and trigger batch generation runs.</div>
  </a>
  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('utility.solid_image_generator_form') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Solid Image Generator</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Generate high-resolution solid color placeholder images. Select from 13 aspect ratios and customize color for testing and reference. Default matte cyan (#00FFFF).</div>
  </a>
</div>

  </a>
</div>

    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Add new mockup template base images to the system library.</div>
  </a>
  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('mockups_admin.bases') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Mockup Bases</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Browse and manage existing mockup bases.</div>

  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('mockups_admin.category_manager') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Category Manager</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Organise mockup categories and assignment rules.</div>

  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('mockup_generator.mockup_generator_dashboard') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Mockup Generator Dashboard</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Monitor real-time generation pipeline status. View job counts by status (Pending, Generating, Processing, Completed, Failed) and trigger batch generation runs.</div>
  </a>
  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('utility.solid_image_generator_form') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Solid Image Generator</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Generate high-resolution solid color placeholder images. Select from 13 aspect ratios and customize color for testing and reference. Default matte cyan (#00FFFF).</div>
  </a>
</div>

    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Solid Image Generator</div>

  </a>
</div>

  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('mockups_admin.category_manager') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Category Manager</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Organise mockup categories and assignment rules.</div>
  </a>
  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('mockup_generator.mockup_generator_dashboard') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Mockup Generator Dashboard</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Monitor real-time generation pipeline status. View job counts by status (Pending, Generating, Processing, Completed, Failed) and trigger batch generation runs.</div>
  </a>
  <a class="artlomo-data-card artlomo-nav-card" href="{{ url_for('utility.solid_image_generator_form') }}">
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__title">Solid Image Generator</div>
    <div class="artlomo-nav-card__body">Generate high-resolution solid color placeholder images. Select from 13 aspect ratios and customize color for testing and reference. Default matte cyan (#00FFFF).</div>
  </a>
</div>

## Direct URL Access

- Mockup Generator Dashboard: <http://localhost:5000/admin/mockups/mockup-generator>

- Solid Image Generator: <http://localhost:5000/admin/mockups/solid-image-generator>

## Blueprint Endpoint Reference

From `mockup_generator_bp`:

- `mockup_generator.mockup_generator_dashboard`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/mockup-generator`

  - Display pipeline control center dashboard

- `mockup_generator.start_generation_pipeline`

  - `POST /admin/mockups/mockup-generator/start-pipeline`

  - Trigger batch generation (returns JSON)

- `mockup_generator.get_generator_status`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/mockup-generator/status`

  - Fetch current status as JSON (for AJAX updates)

From `utility_bp`:

- `utility.solid_image_generator_form`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/solid-image-generator`

  - Display the generator form

- `utility.solid_image_generator_download`

  - `POST /admin/mockups/solid-image-generator`

  - Process form and download image

## Direct URL Access

- Mockup Generator Dashboard: <http://localhost:5000/admin/mockups/mockup-generator>

- Solid Image Generator: <http://localhost:5000/admin/mockups/solid-image-generator>

  - `GET /admin/mockups/solid-image-generator`

  - Display the generator form

- `utility.solid_image_generator_download`

  - `POST /admin/mockups/solid-image-generator`

  - Process form and download image

## Direct URL Access

- Solid Image Generator: <http://localhost:5000/admin/mockups/solid-image-generator>

  - `POST /admin/mockups/mockup-generator/start-pipeline`

  - Trigger batch generation (returns JSON)

  - `GET /admin/mockups/mockup-generator/status`

  - Fetch current status as JSON (for AJAX updates)

- Solid Image Generator: <http://localhost:5000/admin/mockups/solid-image-generator>

## Blueprint Endpoint Reference

From `mockup_generator_bp`:

- `mockup_generator.mockup_generator_dashboard`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/mockup-generator`

  - Display pipeline control center dashboard

- `mockup_generator.start_generation_pipeline`

  - `POST /admin/mockups/mockup-generator/start-pipeline`

  - Trigger batch generation (returns JSON)

- `mockup_generator.get_generator_status`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/mockup-generator/status`

  - Fetch current status as JSON (for AJAX updates)

From `utility_bp`:

- `utility.solid_image_generator_form`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/solid-image-generator`

  - Display the generator form

- `utility.solid_image_generator_download`

  - `POST /admin/mockups/solid-image-generator`

  - Process form and download image

- Solid Image Generator: <http://localhost:5000/admin/mockups/solid-image-generator>

## Blueprint Endpoint Reference

From `mockup_generator_bp`:

- `mockup_generator.mockup_generator_dashboard`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/mockup-generator`

  - Display pipeline control center dashboard

- `mockup_generator.start_generation_pipeline`

  - `POST /admin/mockups/mockup-generator/start-pipeline`

  - Trigger batch generation (returns JSON)

- `mockup_generator.get_generator_status`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/mockup-generator/status`

  - Fetch current status as JSON (for AJAX updates)

From `utility_bp`:

- `utility.solid_image_generator_form`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/solid-image-generator`

  - Display the generator form

- `utility.solid_image_generator_download`

  - `POST /admin/mockups/solid-image-generator`

  - Process form and download image

- Solid Image Generator: <http://localhost:5000/admin/mockups/solid-image-generator>

## Blueprint Endpoint Reference

From `mockup_generator_bp`:

- `mockup_generator.mockup_generator_dashboard`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/mockup-generator`

  - Display pipeline control center dashboard

- `mockup_generator.start_generation_pipeline`

  - `POST /admin/mockups/mockup-generator/start-pipeline`

  - Trigger batch generation (returns JSON)

- `mockup_generator.get_generator_status`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/mockup-generator/status`

  - Fetch current status as JSON (for AJAX updates)

From `utility_bp`:

- `utility.solid_image_generator_form`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/solid-image-generator`

  - Display the generator form

- `utility.solid_image_generator_download`

  - `POST /admin/mockups/solid-image-generator`

  - Process form and download image

- Solid Image Generator: <http://localhost:5000/admin/mockups/solid-image-generator>

## Blueprint Endpoint Reference

From `mockup_generator_bp`:

- `mockup_generator.mockup_generator_dashboard`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/mockup-generator`

  - Display pipeline control center dashboard

- `mockup_generator.start_generation_pipeline`

  - `POST /admin/mockups/mockup-generator/start-pipeline`

  - Trigger batch generation (returns JSON)

- `mockup_generator.get_generator_status`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/mockup-generator/status`

  - Fetch current status as JSON (for AJAX updates)

From `utility_bp`:

- `utility.solid_image_generator_form`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/solid-image-generator`

  - Display the generator form

- `utility.solid_image_generator_download`

  - `POST /admin/mockups/solid-image-generator`

  - Process form and download image

- Solid Image Generator: <http://localhost:5000/admin/mockups/solid-image-generator>

## Blueprint Endpoint Reference

From `mockup_generator_bp`:

- `mockup_generator.mockup_generator_dashboard`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/mockup-generator`

  - Display pipeline control center dashboard

- `mockup_generator.start_generation_pipeline`

  - `POST /admin/mockups/mockup-generator/start-pipeline`

  - Trigger batch generation (returns JSON)

- `mockup_generator.get_generator_status`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/mockup-generator/status`

  - Fetch current status as JSON (for AJAX updates)

From `utility_bp`:

- `utility.solid_image_generator_form`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/solid-image-generator`

  - Display the generator form

- `utility.solid_image_generator_download`

  - `POST /admin/mockups/solid-image-generator`

  - Process form and download image

- Solid Image Generator: <http://localhost:5000/admin/mockups/solid-image-generator>

## Blueprint Endpoint Reference

From `mockup_generator_bp`:

- `mockup_generator.mockup_generator_dashboard`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/mockup-generator`

  - Display pipeline control center dashboard

- `mockup_generator.start_generation_pipeline`

  - `POST /admin/mockups/mockup-generator/start-pipeline`

  - Trigger batch generation (returns JSON)

- `mockup_generator.get_generator_status`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/mockup-generator/status`

  - Fetch current status as JSON (for AJAX updates)

From `utility_bp`:

- `utility.solid_image_generator_form`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/solid-image-generator`

  - Display the generator form

- `utility.solid_image_generator_download`

  - `POST /admin/mockups/solid-image-generator`

  - Process form and download image

- Solid Image Generator: <http://localhost:5000/admin/mockups/solid-image-generator>

## Blueprint Endpoint Reference

From `mockup_generator_bp`:

- `mockup_generator.mockup_generator_dashboard`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/mockup-generator`

  - Display pipeline control center dashboard

- `mockup_generator.start_generation_pipeline`

  - `POST /admin/mockups/mockup-generator/start-pipeline`

  - Trigger batch generation (returns JSON)

- `mockup_generator.get_generator_status`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/mockup-generator/status`

  - Fetch current status as JSON (for AJAX updates)

From `utility_bp`:

- `utility.solid_image_generator_form`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/solid-image-generator`

  - Display the generator form

- `utility.solid_image_generator_download`

  - `POST /admin/mockups/solid-image-generator`

  - Process form and download image

- Solid Image Generator: <http://localhost:5000/admin/mockups/solid-image-generator>

## Blueprint Endpoint Reference

From `mockup_generator_bp`:

- `mockup_generator.mockup_generator_dashboard`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/mockup-generator`

  - Display pipeline control center dashboard

- `mockup_generator.start_generation_pipeline`

  - `POST /admin/mockups/mockup-generator/start-pipeline`

  - Trigger batch generation (returns JSON)

- `mockup_generator.get_generator_status`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/mockup-generator/status`

  - Fetch current status as JSON (for AJAX updates)

From `utility_bp`:

- `utility.solid_image_generator_form`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/solid-image-generator`

  - Display the generator form

- `utility.solid_image_generator_download`

  - `POST /admin/mockups/solid-image-generator`

  - Process form and download image

- Solid Image Generator: <http://localhost:5000/admin/mockups/solid-image-generator>

## Blueprint Endpoint Reference

From `mockup_generator_bp`:

- `mockup_generator.mockup_generator_dashboard`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/mockup-generator`

  - Display pipeline control center dashboard

- `mockup_generator.start_generation_pipeline`

  - `POST /admin/mockups/mockup-generator/start-pipeline`

  - Trigger batch generation (returns JSON)

- `mockup_generator.get_generator_status`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/mockup-generator/status`

  - Fetch current status as JSON (for AJAX updates)

From `utility_bp`:

- `utility.solid_image_generator_form`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/solid-image-generator`

  - Display the generator form

- `utility.solid_image_generator_download`

  - `POST /admin/mockups/solid-image-generator`

  - Process form and download image

- Solid Image Generator: <http://localhost:5000/admin/mockups/solid-image-generator>

## Blueprint Endpoint Reference

From `mockup_generator_bp`:

- `mockup_generator.mockup_generator_dashboard`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/mockup-generator`

  - Display pipeline control center dashboard

- `mockup_generator.start_generation_pipeline`

  - `POST /admin/mockups/mockup-generator/start-pipeline`

  - Trigger batch generation (returns JSON)

- `mockup_generator.get_generator_status`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/mockup-generator/status`

  - Fetch current status as JSON (for AJAX updates)

From `utility_bp`:

- `utility.solid_image_generator_form`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/solid-image-generator`

  - Display the generator form

- `utility.solid_image_generator_download`

  - `POST /admin/mockups/solid-image-generator`

  - Process form and download image

- Solid Image Generator: <http://localhost:5000/admin/mockups/solid-image-generator>

## Blueprint Endpoint Reference

From `mockup_generator_bp`:

- `mockup_generator.mockup_generator_dashboard`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/mockup-generator`

  - Display pipeline control center dashboard

- `mockup_generator.start_generation_pipeline`

  - `POST /admin/mockups/mockup-generator/start-pipeline`

  - Trigger batch generation (returns JSON)

- `mockup_generator.get_generator_status`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/mockup-generator/status`

  - Fetch current status as JSON (for AJAX updates)

From `utility_bp`:

- `utility.solid_image_generator_form`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/solid-image-generator`

  - Display the generator form

- `utility.solid_image_generator_download`

  - `POST /admin/mockups/solid-image-generator`

  - Process form and download image

- Solid Image Generator: <http://localhost:5000/admin/mockups/solid-image-generator>

## Blueprint Endpoint Reference

From `mockup_generator_bp`:

- `mockup_generator.mockup_generator_dashboard`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/mockup-generator`

  - Display pipeline control center dashboard

- `mockup_generator.start_generation_pipeline`

  - `POST /admin/mockups/mockup-generator/start-pipeline`

  - Trigger batch generation (returns JSON)

- `mockup_generator.get_generator_status`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/mockup-generator/status`

  - Fetch current status as JSON (for AJAX updates)

From `utility_bp`:

- `utility.solid_image_generator_form`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/solid-image-generator`

  - Display the generator form

- `utility.solid_image_generator_download`

  - `POST /admin/mockups/solid-image-generator`

  - Process form and download image

- Solid Image Generator: <http://localhost:5000/admin/mockups/solid-image-generator>

## Blueprint Endpoint Reference

From `mockup_generator_bp`:

- `mockup_generator.mockup_generator_dashboard`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/mockup-generator`

  - Display pipeline control center dashboard

- `mockup_generator.start_generation_pipeline`

  - `POST /admin/mockups/mockup-generator/start-pipeline`

  - Trigger batch generation (returns JSON)

- `mockup_generator.get_generator_status`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/mockup-generator/status`

  - Fetch current status as JSON (for AJAX updates)

From `utility_bp`:

- `utility.solid_image_generator_form`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/solid-image-generator`

  - Display the generator form

- `utility.solid_image_generator_download`

  - `POST /admin/mockups/solid-image-generator`

  - Process form and download image

- Solid Image Generator: <http://localhost:5000/admin/mockups/solid-image-generator>

## Blueprint Endpoint Reference

From `mockup_generator_bp`:

- `mockup_generator.mockup_generator_dashboard`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/mockup-generator`

  - Display pipeline control center dashboard

- `mockup_generator.start_generation_pipeline`

  - `POST /admin/mockups/mockup-generator/start-pipeline`

  - Trigger batch generation (returns JSON)

- `mockup_generator.get_generator_status`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/mockup-generator/status`

  - Fetch current status as JSON (for AJAX updates)

From `utility_bp`:

- `utility.solid_image_generator_form`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/solid-image-generator`

  - Display the generator form

- `utility.solid_image_generator_download`

  - `POST /admin/mockups/solid-image-generator`

  - Process form and download image

- Solid Image Generator: <http://localhost:5000/admin/mockups/solid-image-generator>

## Blueprint Endpoint Reference

From `mockup_generator_bp`:

- `mockup_generator.mockup_generator_dashboard`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/mockup-generator`

  - Display pipeline control center dashboard

- `mockup_generator.start_generation_pipeline`

  - `POST /admin/mockups/mockup-generator/start-pipeline`

  - Trigger batch generation (returns JSON)

- `mockup_generator.get_generator_status`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/mockup-generator/status`

  - Fetch current status as JSON (for AJAX updates)

From `utility_bp`:

- `utility.solid_image_generator_form`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/solid-image-generator`

  - Display the generator form

- `utility.solid_image_generator_download`

  - `POST /admin/mockups/solid-image-generator`

  - Process form and download image

- Solid Image Generator: <http://localhost:5000/admin/mockups/solid-image-generator>

## Blueprint Endpoint Reference

From `mockup_generator_bp`:

- `mockup_generator.mockup_generator_dashboard`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/mockup-generator`

  - Display pipeline control center dashboard

- `mockup_generator.start_generation_pipeline`

  - `POST /admin/mockups/mockup-generator/start-pipeline`

  - Trigger batch generation (returns JSON)

- `mockup_generator.get_generator_status`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/mockup-generator/status`

  - Fetch current status as JSON (for AJAX updates)

From `utility_bp`:

- `utility.solid_image_generator_form`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/solid-image-generator`

  - Display the generator form

- `utility.solid_image_generator_download`

  - `POST /admin/mockups/solid-image-generator`

  - Process form and download image

- Solid Image Generator: <http://localhost:5000/admin/mockups/solid-image-generator>

## Blueprint Endpoint Reference

From `mockup_generator_bp`:

- `mockup_generator.mockup_generator_dashboard`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/mockup-generator`

  - Display pipeline control center dashboard

- `mockup_generator.start_generation_pipeline`

  - `POST /admin/mockups/mockup-generator/start-pipeline`

  - Trigger batch generation (returns JSON)

- `mockup_generator.get_generator_status`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/mockup-generator/status`

  - Fetch current status as JSON (for AJAX updates)

From `utility_bp`:

- `utility.solid_image_generator_form`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/solid-image-generator`

  - Display the generator form

- `utility.solid_image_generator_download`

  - `POST /admin/mockups/solid-image-generator`

  - Process form and download image

- Solid Image Generator: <http://localhost:5000/admin/mockups/solid-image-generator>

## Blueprint Endpoint Reference

From `mockup_generator_bp`:

- `mockup_generator.mockup_generator_dashboard`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/mockup-generator`

  - Display pipeline control center dashboard

- `mockup_generator.start_generation_pipeline`

  - `POST /admin/mockups/mockup-generator/start-pipeline`

  - Trigger batch generation (returns JSON)

- `mockup_generator.get_generator_status`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/mockup-generator/status`

  - Fetch current status as JSON (for AJAX updates)

From `utility_bp`:

- `utility.solid_image_generator_form`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/solid-image-generator`

  - Display the generator form

- `utility.solid_image_generator_download`

  - `POST /admin/mockups/solid-image-generator`

  - Process form and download image

- Solid Image Generator: <http://localhost:5000/admin/mockups/solid-image-generator>

## Blueprint Endpoint Reference

From `mockup_generator_bp`:

- `mockup_generator.mockup_generator_dashboard`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/mockup-generator`

  - Display pipeline control center dashboard

- `mockup_generator.start_generation_pipeline`

  - `POST /admin/mockups/mockup-generator/start-pipeline`

  - Trigger batch generation (returns JSON)

- `mockup_generator.get_generator_status`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/mockup-generator/status`

  - Fetch current status as JSON (for AJAX updates)

From `utility_bp`:

- `utility.solid_image_generator_form`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/solid-image-generator`

  - Display the generator form

- `utility.solid_image_generator_download`

  - `POST /admin/mockups/solid-image-generator`

  - Process form and download image

- Solid Image Generator: <http://localhost:5000/admin/mockups/solid-image-generator>

## Blueprint Endpoint Reference

From `mockup_generator_bp`:

- `mockup_generator.mockup_generator_dashboard`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/mockup-generator`

  - Display pipeline control center dashboard

- `mockup_generator.start_generation_pipeline`

  - `POST /admin/mockups/mockup-generator/start-pipeline`

  - Trigger batch generation (returns JSON)

- `mockup_generator.get_generator_status`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/mockup-generator/status`

  - Fetch current status as JSON (for AJAX updates)

From `utility_bp`:

- `utility.solid_image_generator_form`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/solid-image-generator`

  - Display the generator form

- `utility.solid_image_generator_download`

  - `POST /admin/mockups/solid-image-generator`

  - Process form and download image

- Solid Image Generator: <http://localhost:5000/admin/mockups/solid-image-generator>

## Blueprint Endpoint Reference

From `mockup_generator_bp`:

- `mockup_generator.mockup_generator_dashboard`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/mockup-generator`

  - Display pipeline control center dashboard

- `mockup_generator.start_generation_pipeline`

  - `POST /admin/mockups/mockup-generator/start-pipeline`

  - Trigger batch generation (returns JSON)

- `mockup_generator.get_generator_status`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/mockup-generator/status`

  - Fetch current status as JSON (for AJAX updates)

From `utility_bp`:

- `utility.solid_image_generator_form`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/solid-image-generator`

  - Display the generator form

- `utility.solid_image_generator_download`

  - `POST /admin/mockups/solid-image-generator`

  - Process form and download image

- Solid Image Generator: <http://localhost:5000/admin/mockups/solid-image-generator>

## Blueprint Endpoint Reference

From `mockup_generator_bp`:

- `mockup_generator.mockup_generator_dashboard`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/mockup-generator`

  - Display pipeline control center dashboard

- `mockup_generator.start_generation_pipeline`

  - `POST /admin/mockups/mockup-generator/start-pipeline`

  - Trigger batch generation (returns JSON)

- `mockup_generator.get_generator_status`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/mockup-generator/status`

  - Fetch current status as JSON (for AJAX updates)

From `utility_bp`:

- `utility.solid_image_generator_form`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/solid-image-generator`

  - Display the generator form

- `utility.solid_image_generator_download`

  - `POST /admin/mockups/solid-image-generator`

  - Process form and download image

- Solid Image Generator: <http://localhost:5000/admin/mockups/solid-image-generator>

## Blueprint Endpoint Reference

From `mockup_generator_bp`:

- `mockup_generator.mockup_generator_dashboard`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/mockup-generator`

  - Display pipeline control center dashboard

- `mockup_generator.start_generation_pipeline`

  - `POST /admin/mockups/mockup-generator/start-pipeline`

  - Trigger batch generation (returns JSON)

- `mockup_generator.get_generator_status`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/mockup-generator/status`

  - Fetch current status as JSON (for AJAX updates)

From `utility_bp`:

- `utility.solid_image_generator_form`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/solid-image-generator`

  - Display the generator form

- `utility.solid_image_generator_download`

  - `POST /admin/mockups/solid-image-generator`

  - Process form and download image

- Solid Image Generator: <http://localhost:5000/admin/mockups/solid-image-generator>

## Blueprint Endpoint Reference

From `mockup_generator_bp`:

- `mockup_generator.mockup_generator_dashboard`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/mockup-generator`

  - Display pipeline control center dashboard

- `mockup_generator.start_generation_pipeline`

  - `POST /admin/mockups/mockup-generator/start-pipeline`

  - Trigger batch generation (returns JSON)

- `mockup_generator.get_generator_status`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/mockup-generator/status`

  - Fetch current status as JSON (for AJAX updates)

From `utility_bp`:

- `utility.solid_image_generator_form`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/solid-image-generator`

  - Display the generator form

- `utility.solid_image_generator_download`

  - `POST /admin/mockups/solid-image-generator`

  - Process form and download image

- Solid Image Generator: <http://localhost:5000/admin/mockups/solid-image-generator>

## Blueprint Endpoint Reference

From `mockup_generator_bp`:

- `mockup_generator.mockup_generator_dashboard`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/mockup-generator`

  - Display pipeline control center dashboard

- `mockup_generator.start_generation_pipeline`

  - `POST /admin/mockups/mockup-generator/start-pipeline`

  - Trigger batch generation (returns JSON)

- `mockup_generator.get_generator_status`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/mockup-generator/status`

  - Fetch current status as JSON (for AJAX updates)

From `utility_bp`:

- `utility.solid_image_generator_form`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/solid-image-generator`

  - Display the generator form

- `utility.solid_image_generator_download`

  - `POST /admin/mockups/solid-image-generator`

  - Process form and download image

- Solid Image Generator: <http://localhost:5000/admin/mockups/solid-image-generator>

## Blueprint Endpoint Reference

From `mockup_generator_bp`:

- `mockup_generator.mockup_generator_dashboard`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/mockup-generator`

  - Display pipeline control center dashboard

- `mockup_generator.start_generation_pipeline`

  - `POST /admin/mockups/mockup-generator/start-pipeline`

  - Trigger batch generation (returns JSON)

- `mockup_generator.get_generator_status`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/mockup-generator/status`

  - Fetch current status as JSON (for AJAX updates)

From `utility_bp`:

- `utility.solid_image_generator_form`

  - `GET /admin/mockups/solid-image-generator`

  - Display the generator form

- `utility.solid_image_generator_download`

  - `POST /admin/mockups/solid-image-generator`

  - Process form and download image
